text.title: Feature Flag Services, Testing, and Agentic Workflow Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: OFF branch breaks silently after a refactor; users with flag OFF see errors.
antipattern.fix: Add flag_on / flag_off fixtures; require both per flag-gated test.

antipattern.symptom: 11 flags live > 1 year; 4 owners no longer with company.
antipattern.fix: Add the weekly CI audit; fail when any stale flag exists.

antipattern.symptom: Migration off LaunchDarkly takes 3 weeks; client code hard-codes provider SDK.
antipattern.fix: Wrap calls in OpenFeature; provider is configurable.
